en.text: apparently a primary verb (but probably akin to G0142 through the idea of raising a barrier); properly, to ward off, i.e. (by implication) to avail (figuratively, be satisfactory)

senses.gloss_en: apparently a primary verb (but probably akin to G0142 through the idea of raising a barrier); properly, to ward off, i.e. (by implication) to avail (figuratively, be satisfactory)
